scripts.dev: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run android
scripts.android: gradlew installDebug && adb shell am start -n com.example.gtmonitor/.MainActivity
scripts.android-prod: gradlew installRelease && adb shell am start -n com.example.gtmonitor/.MainActivity
scripts.release: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run assemble && npm run assemble-prod && npm run bundle && npm run bundle-prod && npm run android-prod
